name: guru-approve-task-plan
description: Approve a task plan through adequacy, provenance, unusual-scenario review, exact confirmations, deterministic evidence, and four typed exits.

entry_preconditions.evidence: installed extension manifest, dispatcher, active package inventory, schema, and declared planning record/check runtime commands
entry_preconditions.binding: complete compatible Guru Team preset runtime
entry_preconditions.freshness: validated by run-skill-command before every runtime command

entry_preconditions.evidence: current task locator, task.json, local runtime workspace mapping, current checkout, and source-checkout boundary facts
entry_preconditions.binding: one direct active task in its expected repository worktree
entry_preconditions.freshness: workspace boundary is rebuilt before recording and checking

entry_preconditions.evidence: current issue, selected comments, user request, and task-local authority projections
entry_preconditions.binding: the exact source authority used by every load-bearing planning statement
entry_preconditions.freshness: authority identity and content digests are reread before approval

entry_preconditions.evidence: current prd.md, design.md, and implement.md with non-placeholder content and stable locators
entry_preconditions.binding: the exact three documents reviewed by the semantic gate and user
entry_preconditions.freshness: content digests are rebuilt before recording, checking, and downstream consumption

entry_preconditions.evidence: one locatable Docs SSOT Plan with strategy, durable paths, task delta, and merge/no-update responsibility
entry_preconditions.binding: the durable-docs execution contract for this task
entry_preconditions.freshness: locator and canonical statement digest are resolved from current planning content

entry_preconditions.binding: the same three planning document bytes and canonical planning-only dimensions
entry_preconditions.freshness: the generic wording checker and exact evidence digests are rerun

entry_preconditions.evidence: current issue-scope-ledger.json primary, close, related, follow-up, and structured decision state
entry_preconditions.binding: the task's current accepted scope and authority-change history
entry_preconditions.freshness: ledger identity and linked authority/planning evidence are rebuilt

entry_preconditions.evidence: selected base ref/head, invocation head, current branch, status, and dirty paths
entry_preconditions.freshness: snapshot is reread before and after recording; downstream drift rules bind planning and authority content

entry_preconditions.evidence: mode, task, authorities, planning/docs/wording facts, semantic review, confirmations, typed exit, consumer, and facts digest
entry_preconditions.freshness: checker recomputes objective facts and rejects incomplete, stale, multiple, or mismatched results

validators.objective_scope: AI-reviewed input consumption, current task/workspace/authority/planning/docs/wording/repository fact rebuild, planning-locator or unusual-candidate proposal digest recomputation, dedicated confirmation and current-authority same-proposal binding, closed schema, artifact write, and facts digest

published v2 schema, current fact, statement, planning-locator proposal, unusual-candidate proposal, and authority digest recomputation, provenance field shape, dedicated confirmation and current-authority same-proposal binding, Gate/exit/consumer union, artifact digest, freshness, and approved-only activation

external_exits.evidence: passed AI Gate, complete provenance, no unresolved unusual proposal, current wording evidence, exact post-planning confirmation, and current v2 artifact
the AI identified task-local planning gaps with non-empty revision actions and no authority mutation
the AI identified a non-empty authority or scope mutation proposal excluded from approved execution
authority is missing, required proposal was refused, an external blocker exists, or safe task-local revision is impossible

reentry.identity: mode, task, three planning digests, Docs SSOT locator, ordinary or unusual proposal binding, current authority digest, authority and wording identities, semantic review, confirmations, typed exit, consumer, and facts digest
reentry.freshness: every re-entry reruns all nine entry checks; revision reruns wording after planning changes and clarification reruns current authority/context/planning
